name: Freelancer Lead Funnel
description: Attract and convert high-quality freelance clients with a professional service funnel

automation.followUp: Send booking link if qualified after 24h
Send proposal follow-up within 48h of call

assets.title: Service / Work With Me Page
assets.content:
HEADLINE:
[Specific Outcome] for [Ideal Client Type]

SUBHEADLINE:
I help [client type] [achieve outcome] without [pain point] — so you can [higher-level benefit].

IS THIS YOU?
→ You're a [ideal client description]
→ You need [what they need] but [the constraint — time, skill, bandwidth]
→ You've tried [DIY approach or other options] but it's not working
→ You're ready to [commit to professional help]

HERE'S HOW I CAN HELP:

[SERVICE 1 NAME]
[1-2 sentence description. Who it's for. What they walk away with.]
Starting at $[price] | [Timeframe]

[SERVICE 2 NAME]
[1-2 sentence description.]
Starting at $[price] | [Timeframe]

[SERVICE 3 — Retainer/Ongoing]
[Description.]
$[price]/month | Minimum [X] months

WHAT CLIENTS SAY:
"[Testimonial focused on outcome and experience]"
— [Name, Company/Role]

"[Second testimonial]"
— [Name, Company/Role]

RECENT WORK:
[Project 1] — [client type] — [outcome achieved]
[Project 2] — [client type] — [outcome achieved]
[Project 3] — [client type] — [outcome achieved]

ABOUT ME:
[2-3 sentences: your background, your specific expertise, why clients choose you over alternatives]

HOW IT WORKS:
1. Fill out the inquiry form below
2. I'll review your project and respond within [timeframe]
3. If we're a fit, we'll book a free [X]-minute discovery call
4. I'll send a proposal within [timeframe] of our call

[CTA BUTTON: Start Your Project]

FAQ:
Q: How long does a project take?
A: [Answer]

Q: Do you take on rush projects?
A: [Answer]

Q: What's your availability?
A: [Answer]

assets.title: Project Inquiry Form
assets.content:
{
  "headline": "Tell Me About Your Project",
  "subheadline": "Fill this out and I'll get back to you within 1 business day.",
  "fields": [
    { "label": "Your Name", "type": "text", "required": true },
    { "label": "Email Address", "type": "email", "required": true },
    { "label": "Company or Website", "type": "text", "required": false },
    { "label": "What service are you interested in?", "type": "select", "required": true, "options": ["[Service 1]", "[Service 2]", "[Service 3]", "Not sure yet"] },
    { "label": "Describe your project", "type": "textarea", "required": true, "placeholder": "Tell me what you're working on, what you need, and what success looks like for you." },
    { "label": "What's your timeline?", "type": "select", "required": true, "options": ["ASAP", "Within 1 month", "1–3 months", "Just exploring"] },
    { "label": "What's your approximate budget?", "type": "select", "required": false, "options": ["Under $500", "$500–$1,500", "$1,500–$5,000", "$5,000+", "Let's discuss"] }
  ],
  "buttonText": "Submit My Project",
  "thankYouMessage": "Got it! I'll review your project and get back to you within 1 business day. Check your inbox for a confirmation."
}

assets.title: Qualification Question #1 — Budget & Timeline
assets.content:
Hey [Name],

Thanks for reaching out about [their project description].

Before I put together any recommendations, I have a couple of quick questions to make sure I'm the right fit:

1. What's your timeline for getting started? (ASAP / next 2–4 weeks / flexible)

2. Do you have a budget range in mind? Even a rough number helps me recommend the right approach.

3. Have you worked with a [your service type] before, or is this your first time?

Once I know this, I'll either set up a quick call or send over some initial thoughts directly.

[Your name]

assets.title: Qualification Question #2 — Deeper Discovery
assets.content:
Thanks for the details, [Name]!

A few more questions to help me give you the most useful response:

1. What's your primary goal with this project? (For example: [option A], [option B], or [option C])

2. What does success look like 90 days from now? What would have to be true for you to consider this a win?

3. What's the biggest obstacle you're running into right now — is it [option A], [option B], or something else?

These help me come to the call with something actually useful rather than generic suggestions.

[Your name]

assets.title: Qualification Question #3 — Decision & Fit
assets.content:
Last question before I send the calendar link:

Who's involved in making the final decision on this project? Just you, or are others involved?

And — just so I can prepare the right proposal — are you comparing a few options right now, or are you specifically looking for someone who [your unique approach or positioning]?

No judgment either way. I just want to make the discovery call as useful as possible for both of us.

If everything sounds aligned, here's my calendar: [LINK]

Looking forward to it.

[Your name]

assets.title: Post-Inquiry Confirmation Email
assets.content:
Subject: Got your project inquiry — here's what happens next

Hi [Name],

Thanks for reaching out about [their project].

I've received your inquiry and I'm reviewing it now. You'll hear back from me within [timeframe] with either:

a) A few follow-up questions (if I need to understand your project better), or
b) A calendar link to book a free [X]-minute discovery call

While you wait, here are a few things that might be useful:

→ [Link to portfolio or case study]
→ [Link to FAQ or process page]
→ [Link to testimonials]

If your project is urgent, feel free to reply directly to this email.

Talk soon,
[Your name]
[Your title / website]

assets.title: Discovery Call Prep Email
assets.content:
Subject: Your call with [Your Name] — [date/time]

Hey [Name],

Looking forward to our call [day] at [time].

Here's the call link: [ZOOM/CALENDAR LINK]

To make the most of our [X] minutes together, it helps if you come prepared with:

1. A clear description of your project and what you're trying to achieve
2. Any examples of work you love (competitors, inspirations, benchmarks)
3. Your honest budget range
4. Your timeline and any hard deadlines

I'll use our time to:
→ Understand your project and goals
→ Share my initial approach
→ Answer any questions you have
→ Discuss fit and next steps

No pressure. If we're not the right fit, I'll tell you — and I'll point you to someone who might be.

See you [day],
[Your name]

assets.title: Post-Call Follow-Up / Proposal
assets.content:
Subject: Great talking — here's what I'm proposing

Hey [Name],

Great call today. Based on our conversation, here's what I'm proposing:

PROJECT OVERVIEW:
[1-2 sentences summarizing their need and goal — prove you listened]

MY APPROACH:
[How you'll solve their problem — your process in 3-4 bullet points]

DELIVERABLES:
• [Deliverable 1]
• [Deliverable 2]
• [Deliverable 3]

TIMELINE:
• Project start: [Date]
• [Milestone 1]: [Date]
• Final delivery: [Date]

INVESTMENT:
$[Amount] — [payment structure: 50% upfront, 50% on delivery — or monthly]

NEXT STEPS:
If this looks good to you, reply with "Yes" or "Let's start" and I'll send over the contract.

If you have questions or want to adjust anything, just reply.

Proposal is valid for [X] days.

[Your name]

P.S. [Optional: reinforce value or address a potential objection from the call]
